purpose: Continuation roadmap for hook packaging, audio mix, visual continuity, and publish handoff artifacts.

artifacts.purpose: Compare hook candidates for specificity, muted readability, curiosity, risk, and first-frame pairing.
Bind hook, title, cover text, CTA, promise, payoff, and selected platform variants to the video structure.
Record voice provider, voice id, language, tone, speed, and fallback per speaker.
Record generated audio unit paths, durations, provider/model/cost metadata, retries, and timing source.
Verify narration, music, silence, clipping, ducking, intelligibility, and caption/audio drift.
Record stable style language, palette, lighting, typography, motion language, and negative constraints.
Preserve recurring character appearance, reference assets, allowed variations, and forbidden changes.
Plan multi-panel storyboard or transition grids with reference mapping and negative constraints.
Review character, environment, style, and motion continuity across adjacent generated visuals.
Tie platform title, description, hashtags, cover text, thumbnail, rights, review bundle, and platform profile to the final video.
Plan cover frame, generated thumbnail, or designed-card thumbnail with text and safe-zone metadata.
Prepare upload or scheduling handoff with target platforms, package paths, manual steps, credentials needs, and status.

gates: Packaging must not promise a payoff absent from the video.
Audio duration and mix quality must be measured after generation.
Recurring generated characters or scenes must cite continuity references.
Publish metadata must link to review, rights, asset ledger, and platform profile artifacts.
Upload handoff must not hide required credentials or manual approval.
